rulings.Case Title: ELIZABETH PADILLA VS. SHEREE DELORIO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 11, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT SHEREE DELORIO's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. Request for punitive damages in conjunction with tort and statutory violation causes of action are sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ELIZABETH PADILLA VS. SHEREE DELORIO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 11, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT SHEREE DELORIO's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. rulings.Case Title: JOHN WOODRUFF ET AL VS. MICHAEL VERLATTI
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 11, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT MICHAEL VERLATTI REVOCABLE TRUST's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT CONTINUED to July 10, 2015. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the opposition to department 501 no later than June 19, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SALLY LIU VS. JOSE CERON ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 11, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANT JOSE CERON, ESPETACION MEDINA and BRIAN RANGEL DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer.
